nasb.text: He had forty sons and thirty grandsons who rode on seventy donkeys; and he judged Israel eight years.

esv.text: He had forty sons and thirty grandsons, who rode on seventy donkeys, and he judged Israel eight years.

cnv.text: 他有四十個兒子，三十個孫子，騎著七十頭驢駒；押頓治理以色列人共八年。

ccb.text: 他有四十个儿子、三十个孙子，他的儿孙每人骑一头驴。押顿做以色列的士师八年，
